name: Alapaha Golf Center
about: Alapaha Golf Center is an indoor golf venue that features both a driving range and a golf simulator center. The center offers 4 About Golf Simulators with access to 70 different virtual courses, including famous locations like TPC Sawgrass and Pebble Beach. They also provide a 20-acre driving range with a large grass teeing area. The facility offers lessons with PGA professionals and hosts leagues and clinics. Their operating hours vary by season, with different hours for indoor simulators and outdoor elements.
why_golfers_like_it: Features premium About Golf Simulators with 70+ virtual courses
Offers PGA instruction and various clinic programs
Provides a welcoming environment for both practice and leisure play
Has a large outdoor driving range for traditional practice
Hosts leagues and events for social and competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on premises
No mention of alcohol service on premises

simulator_hardware.notes: State of the art About Golf Simulators

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food service or a policy regarding outside food and drinks, so it's unclear if BYOB is allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time to complete 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly, offering beginner-friendly courses and family-oriented events.
